project.name: HelixAnvil
project.one_liner: Completely native IDE built from scratch — sovereign editor kernel for the portfolio.

strategic_posture.north_star: Own a from-scratch native IDE: document model, commands, and desktop shell under portfolio control — not a foreign editor skin.
strategic_posture.hard_promise: Edit coordinates and the text kernel are HelixAnvil’s; engines attach at boundaries.
strategic_posture.wedge: Native multi-file code editor usable for HelixForge/Rust work on Windows before forge mesh or multiplayer.
what_it_is_not: Not a HelixForge monorepo catalog product

source_of_truth_order: Live files, tests, and current commands

current_focus.summary: Design native editor kernel boundaries (pre-code). HelixCode extreme runs in HelixForge in parallel.

next_product_slice.summary: Design buffer kernel, shell choice, and first code packet boundaries before any native binary.

do_not_start.reason: Packet 000 substrate first; design in 001; code only after 001 clarify gate — HelixCode extreme proceeds in HelixForge in parallel after this scaffold.
Founder protocol: standalone project via substrate, not monorepo product embed.

agent_rules: Never modify files outside allowed_edit_paths for the active feature packet.
Read PROJECT_STATE.json and the active packet before writing any code.
Run all gates before marking a packet done.
Do not implement the IDE binary until packet 001 design is clarified and a subsequent implementation packet is active.
Do not add HelixAnvil as a HelixForge monorepo catalog product.
Long-running GUI/dev processes run in user-owned terminals only.
